Amh Garanjy is grinning eagerly, her wide eyes sparkling more than usual.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
Amh Garanjy can't wait to see you dressed up as the Saint of Nymeia─or, rather, she will wait forever until you are dressed up as the Saint of Nymeia. In an effort to avoid the crippling effects that eternity might have upon you both, you unfold the unorthodox saint's garments and make yourself presentable.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.

49:
You must equip the following items in order to proceed:
Unorthodox Saint's Cap, Unorthodox Saint's Halfrobe, Unorthodox Saint's Gloves, Unorthodox Saint's Bottoms, and Unorthodox Saint's Longboots.
